_note: Vision analysis via the Gemini API node (replaces local Qwen3-VL GGUF).
Used for Stages B/G/J/K. Authenticated with the same ComfyOrg/Gemini key as
node '1' LoadImage  inputs.image        <- uploaded scene image filename
node '2' GeminiNode inputs.model         <- gemini model id
node '2' GeminiNode inputs.seed          <- randomised per call (avoids cache)
TEXT OUTPUT: written by SaveText node '3' to output/gemini_analyze_output.txt and
read back from disk by run_recipe_text (SaveText exposes no history payload).

inputs.prompt: Placeholder — controller patches this with the analysis question.
inputs.system_prompt: You are an expert architectural visualization analyst. Analyze the provided image with precision and return structured, machine-readable responses. Describe only what is actually visible; never invent elements.
